summary: Iteration 221 — Frontend-only verification of AdviserClientDashboard refactor to Truth Journey aesthetic. Loaded /dashboard with localStorage app_mode='adviser' + thompson_family client. All 14 acceptance criteria pass. No console errors. Client portal regression also clean.
critical_code_review_comments: AdviserClientDashboard.jsx is 784 lines — borderline at the 700-line guideline. Consider extracting the 9 inner card components (RetirementReadinessCard, AlertsCard, OpportunitiesCard, BalanceSheetCard, EmbeddedScenario, TodaysPriorities, MeetingPrep, WhatChanged, MarketsStrip, SimulationBanner) into separate files under components/adviser-dashboard/ for maintainability — not blocking.

verification_details.testid_presence: ALL PASS — page-shell, unified-client-overview, client-dashboard-header, card-retirement-readiness, card-alerts, card-opportunities, card-balance-sheet, card-scenario-engine, card-priorities, card-meeting-prep, card-what-changed, markets-strip, cta-improve-outcome, cta-run-scenario, cta-generate-review-pack, btn-improve-outcome, btn-generate-review-pack, confidence-score, scenario-confidence, header-updated
verification_details.strict_bg_audit: ALL 9 CARDS CLEAN — no bg-emerald-50/bg-amber-50/bg-rose-50/bg-rose-100/bg-amber-100/bg-gray-50/navy gradient/FFF8E7 gradient (verified with word-boundary regex; substring false positives ruled out)
verification_details.opportunities_typography: no text-emerald-700, has font-mono — dollar values in mono navy
verification_details.balance_sheet: Gold #D4A84C progress bars present, no navy bars, no text-emerald-700, no text-rose-700
verification_details.scenario_engine_headline: no bg-gradient-to-br from-[#1a2744] — white headline box, scenario-confidence renders percentage
verification_details.markets_strip_inner_cards: p-3 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white — computed rgb(255,255,255)
verification_details.btn_generate_review_pack: bg rgb(26,39,68) navy, border-radius 9999px (pill), white text
verification_details.simulation_banner: not visible in default state (only appears after Improve outcome click) — code review confirms white bg + #D4A84C border (line 687)
verification_details.client_portal_regression: /client-portal with app_mode='client' renders SnapshotTab Net Worth card on white background; no navy gradient detected anywhere in body

context_for_next_testing_agent: AdviserClientDashboard.jsx Truth Journey refactor verified complete in iteration 221. All inner cards (retirement, alerts, opportunities, balance-sheet, scenario-engine, priorities, meeting-prep, what-changed, markets-strip) use white bg + border-slate-200 + font-serif tabular-nums numbers + color-dot severity + gold #D4A84C accent + navy pill CTAs. Sticky duplicate identity card removed; PageShell now owns identity + KPIs. File is 784 lines — extraction into sub-components recommended but not blocking.
